comment.body: FWIW dept.  I have a pattern the market uses at significant tops...today's close and possibly a bit higher at open tomorrow would qualify for leg 1.  Leg 2 would be a sharp down move.  leg 3 makes yet another ATH.  then leg 4 and 5 which i will post in general terms if legs 1,2,3 verify.  It's way too complicated to explain, and it's an edge that took me decades to identify so I don't share the exact details.

@Ryan your Q about small caps.
have you read my educational psot about market theory (efficient market)?

smaller the market cap, higher the potential return too, but i like more predictable vol profile, this is why i focus mainly on SPX.
